name: I'm above the lake bottom
hints: You're underwater near the lake bottom! Air is limited.
SWIM in various directions to explore. Items may be hidden on the bottom.
SWIM EAST and SWIM NORTH reveal hidden items on the lake bottom. SWIM UP to return to the surface.
SWIM UP=lake surface (12). SWIM EAST and SWIM NORTH find items. Don't linger too long underwater.
notes: Underwater at lake bottom. SWIM UP=lake surface (12). SWIM EAST and SWIM NORTH discover hidden items. Limited air supply.
